sessionBrowser.title: Sessions
sessionBrowser.noSessionsDescription: Sessions will appear here once Kizuna captures them.
sessionBrowser.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this chunk?

search.title: Search
search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or a broader query.
search.initialPrompt: Enter a query to search memories
search.initialHint: Search supports English and Japanese (CJK) text.

analysis.title: Workflow Analysis
analysis.noIssuesDescription: Your workflow looks good! No problematic patterns were detected.
analysis.initialPrompt: Select a project and click Analyze
analysis.initialDescription: The analysis engine will scan session data for workflow patterns and suggest improvements.

longSessions.chunks: Session has {{chunkCount}} chunks (threshold: {{threshold}}). This is significantly more than average and may indicate struggling with a task.
longSessions.duration: Session lasted {{hours}} hours (threshold: {{threshold}}h). This is significantly longer than average.

descriptions.manualRepetition: The command "{{command}}" was manually executed in {{sessionCount}} sessions.
descriptions.repeatedErrors: The same error appeared in {{sessionCount}} sessions: "{{error}}"
descriptions.reworkDetection: Detected {{instanceCount}} rework request(s) across {{sessionCount}} session(s). Keywords like "undo", "revert", "やり直し" were found in user messages followed by assistant corrections.
descriptions.testFixLoop: Detected {{cycles}} test-fix cycle(s) in this session. The pattern of running tests, encountering failures, and re-running tests repeated {{cycles}} times.

longSessions.chunks: Long sessions often indicate difficulty with a task. Consider breaking complex tasks into smaller sub-tasks, improving initial context via hooks, or documenting common patterns in CLAUDE.md.
longSessions.duration: Long-running sessions may indicate difficulty with a task. Consider providing more context in hooks or breaking work into smaller increments.

suggestions.manualRepetition: This command is repeated across many sessions. Consider automating it via a Claude Code hook (UserPromptSubmit or SessionEnd) or adding it to your project scripts.
suggestions.repeatedErrors: This error recurs across sessions. Consider adding a fix to your project configuration, updating documentation, or creating a hook that warns about this known issue.
suggestions.reworkDetection: Frequent rework may indicate unclear initial instructions or missing context in hooks. Consider adding more specific guidance in UserPromptSubmit hooks or CLAUDE.md rules.
suggestions.testFixLoop: Frequent test-fix loops may indicate that changes are being made without fully understanding the test expectations. Consider improving test documentation, adding type checks before testing, or breaking changes into smaller increments.

telepathy.title: Telepathy
telepathy.sendDescription: Write a message to share with other projects. The message is stored locally and other projects read it via their references.
telepathy.sendConfirmation: Send this message ({{length}} chars) via telepathy? Other projects will be able to read it.
